sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58851" key="komyolo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κομψο-λόγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n58851.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fine speaking</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἰατροί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:168" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">168</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
